name: jail-search
description: Search papers, books, code, legal cases, forums, Wikipedia, and more from one API.

environment_variables.name: JAIL_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: JAIL Pro API key from jail.li. Optional — trial works without a key.

environment_variables.name: JAIL_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: JAIL Pro API key from jail.li. Optional — trial works without a key.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search documents. Filter by type (academic, books, legal, wiki, forums, etc). Supports pagination.

tools.name: detail
tools.description: Get full metadata for a specific document by ID.

prompts.name: research
prompts.description: Multi-angle research: broad search, then drill into academic papers, books, and forums.

resources.name: jail://schema
resources.description: Compact machine-readable schema for MCP tools.
